basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Director and Junior Executive Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website https://www.chennaiport.gov.in. A total of 8 vacancies for Assistant Director (Finance) and Junior Executive (Finance) posts have been announced through the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age as on 01 July 2026. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: CA / CMA, Member of ICAI or ICMAI, M.Com
qualification.details: Assistant Director (Finance): Must possess CA / CMA. Must be a Member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Minimum 5 years post qualification experience in Accounting and Finance from Industrial / commercial / reputed company having turnover of Rs.100 Cr. and above. Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities. Junior Executive (Finance): Must possess the qualification of CA/CMA (Inter) qualified with Articleship / Internship completion (OR) M. Com with minimum 3 years post qualification experience in Accounting and Finance. Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,70,000 per month (Assistant Director), Rs.50,000 per month (Junior Executive)
salary_details.details: Assistant Director (Finance): Rs.1,70,000 per month Junior Executive (Finance): Rs.50,000 per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chennai Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.chennaiport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Chennai Port Authority Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.chennai_port_authority: Rs.1,70,000 per month (Assistant Director), Rs.50,000 per month (Junior Executive)
CA / CMA, Member of ICAI or ICMAI, M.Com

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Chennai Port Authority Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Director (Finance): Must possess CA / CMA. Must be a Member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Minimum 5 years post qualification experience in Accounting and Finance from Industrial / commercial / reputed company having turnover of Rs.100 Cr. and above. Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities. Junior Executive (Finance): Must possess the qualification of CA/CMA (Inter) qualified with Articleship / Internship completion (OR) M. Com with minimum 3 years post qualification experience in Accounting and Finance. Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age as on 01 July 2026. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Assistant Director (Finance): Rs.1,70,000 per month Junior Executive (Finance): Rs.50,000 per month

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Chennai Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.chennaiport.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Director (Finance) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Director (Finance) post. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 posts in total across different finance roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Director (Finance) position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant Director (Finance) role, candidates must possess CA/CMA and be a member of ICAI or ICMAI, with at least 5 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in this recruitment is 35 years. The age will be calculated as of 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Executive (Finance) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Executive (Finance) post is Rs. 50,000 per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, which is optional, followed by a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions advertised by Chennai Port Authority is contract-based. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Chennai Port Authority, which is www.chennaiport.gov.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section.
